trial_details.eval_reason: Pod is Running with all containers ready (1/1)
trial_details.trajectory:
I'll start by diagnosing the pod issue in the case7-test namespace.Perfect! I've identified the problem. The pod is failing because it's trying to mount a ConfigMap named "app-configuration" that doesn't exist in the namespace. Let me create the missing ConfigMap:## DIAGNOSIS
The pod "volume-mount-app" was stuck in ContainerCreating state because it was trying to mount a ConfigMap named "app-configuration" that did not exist in the case7-test namespace. The kubelet was repeatedly failing with: "MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume 'config-volume': configmap 'app-configuration' not found"

## FIX APPLIED
Created the missing ConfigMap with the command:
```
kubectl create configmap app-configuration -n case7-test --from-literal=config.txt="# Default configuration"
```

This satisfies the volume requirement and allows the pod to proceed with initialization.

FIX COMPLETE

## COMMANDS EXECUTED:
1. $ kubectl get pod volume-mount-app -n case7-test
   Output: NAME               READY   STATUS              RESTARTS   AGE
volume-mount-app   0/1     ContainerCreating   0          13s...
2. $ kubectl describe pod volume-mount-app -n case7-test
   Output: Name:             volume-mount-app
Namespace:        case7-test
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             minikube/192.168.49.2
Start Time:       Thu, 25 Dec 2025 10:40:20 +0300
...
3. $ kubectl logs volume-mount-app -n case7-test
   Output: Exit code 1
Error from server (BadRequest): container "volume-mount-app" in pod "volume-mount-app" is waiting to start: ContainerCreating...
4. $ kubectl get events -n case7-test
   Output: LAST SEEN   TYPE      REASON        OBJECT                 MESSAGE
22s         Normal    Scheduled     pod/volume-mount-app   Successfully assigned case7-test/volume-mount-app to minikube
7s          ...
5. $ kubectl create configmap app-configuration -n case7-test --from-literal=config.txt="# Default configuration"
   Output: configmap/app-configuration created...
